sourcesContent:
const buildImageSet = (keywords, startLock) => [
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${startLock}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${startLock + 1}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${startLock + 2}`,
  `https://loremflickr.com/900/900/${keywords}?lock=${startLock + 3}`,
];

export const categories = [
  {
    id: "fashion",
    label: "Fashion",
    image: "https://loremflickr.com/500/300/fashion,clothing?lock=11",
  },
  {
    id: "electronics",
    label: "Electronics",
    image: "https://loremflickr.com/500/300/electronics,gadgets?lock=12",
  },
  {
    id: "home-decor",
    label: "Home Decor",
    image: "https://loremflickr.com/500/300/home,decor,interior?lock=13",
  },
  {
    id: "beauty",
    label: "Beauty",
    image: "https://loremflickr.com/500/300/beauty,skincare,cosmetics?lock=14",
  },
];

export const products = [
  {
    id: "1",
    title: "Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones",
    category: "Electronics",

    description:

    images: [

      "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/product-images/mobile-accessories/apple-airpods-max-silver/2.webp",
      "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/product-images/mobile-accessories/apple-airpods-max-silver/3.webp",

  {

    rating: 4.6,
    price: 89.99,
    description:
      "Lightweight sneakers with breathable mesh upper and cushioned sole for all-day comfort.",
    images: [
      "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/product-images/mens-shoes/sports-sneakers-off-white-red/1.webp",
      "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/product-images/mens-shoes/sports-sneakers-off-white-red/2.webp",

      "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/product-images/mobile-accessories/apple-watch-series-4-gold/2.webp",
      "https://cdn.dummyjson.com/product-images/mobile-accessories/apple-watch-series-4-gold/3.webp",
